address: Amberes 65, Colonia Juárez, Mexico City, 06600
description: Hidden behind an enigmatic black door in Colonia Juarez whose only sign is the number 13 lies Handshake Speakeasy Copper arches frame the backbar and the long marble counter sits in front like an altar to the cocktail

address: 13 1st Ave., New York, NY 10003
description: Superbueno is a perfectly named bar The bilingual explanation perfectly encapsulates the zeitgeist of this vibrant ode to MexicanAmerican culture Industry veteran Ignacio Nacho Jimenez collaborated with power publican Greg Boehm Katana Kitten Mace to open an elevated cantina on New York Citys Lower East Side

address: Av. Álvaro Obregón 228-Local 2, Roma Nte., Cuauhtémoc, 06700 Ciudad de México, CDMX, Mexico
description: Found right where the mezcalera scene flourished at the beginning of the 21st century Tlecn the Nhuatl word for place of fire has developed a totally new way of understanding mezcal Paying homage to Prehispanic culture  the iconic Disc of the Death clay sculpture is hung as a witness overlooking the interior of the bar  Tlecn offers a diverse selection of artisanal agave distillates from small producers sourced across Mexico

address: 1026 St Louis St, New Orleans, Louisiana, 70112
description: Jewel of the South is a temple to New Orleans culture and the exquisite cocktail skills of cofounder Southern cocktail pioneer Chris Hannah Located in a renovated 1830s Creole cottage Jewels courtyard and woodframed parlour rooms provide a true oasis within the bustling French Quarter

address: 29 Cornelia St, New York, NY 10014, United States
description: No stranger to the 50 Best Bars lists Shingo Gokans work is legendary in Asia and beyond At Sip  Guzzle New Yorkers will discover a sister proper

address: 70 Pine St 64th Floor, New York, 10005
description: A spectacular view of the New York City skyline serves as backdrop for Overstory where the cocktail magic served up is just as memorable as the vistas beyond Located on the 64th floor of historic Financial District building 70 Pine Street the experience begins in the grand lobby of the art deco building where guests are welcomed and escorted via elevator to the petite jewel box of a bar

address: 607 College St, Toronto, ON M6G 1B5, Canada
description: Somewhat ironically Bar Pompette promises vibes that echo the look and feel of Frances most sophisticated cafs despite being located in the Little Italy neighbourhood of Toronto The bar has a welcoming minimalchic ambiance marked by sparsely decorated whitewashed brick walls Cognaccoloured leather banquettes vintage caf chairs and sturdy hardwood floors

address: Calle Marsella 126, Col Americana, Lafayette, Guadalajara, 44160
description: The very spirit of Jalisco feels manifest in El Gallo Altanero First visitors must pass through the Cafe Fitzroy into the adobe and plasterwalled courtyard before climbing a set of stairs to find perched atop a small balcony a true temple to agave

address: Av. Álvaro Obregón 106, Roma Nte., Cuauhtémoc, Mexico City, 06700
description: Mexico Citys celebrated craft cocktail scene all started with Licorera Limantour in 2011 Limantour might be seen as the godfather but the technicolour bilevel neon bar is still imbued with a party spirit that belies that distinguished gravitas

address: 630 W Lake St, Chicago, Illinois, 60661
description: Infused with owner Julia Momoss signature elegance and razorsharp attention to detail Kumiko is a sophisticated cocktail bar blending Japanese and American cocktail influences with style and finesse The minimal interiors are softened by light wood and exposed brick punctuated with thoughtful details like the occasional flower arrangement helping Kumiko serve as a quiet and upscale respite from the bustle of Chicagos West Loop bar scene

address: 11 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10010, United States
description: Daniel Humm needs little introduction in the world of hospitality When the visionary chef behind New York fine dining institution Eleven Madison Park reached o

address: 1712 N Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90027, United States
description: Mrate a multilevel skylit and foliage ensconced oasis is a refreshing new addition to the Los Feliz area in Los Angeles with beverage director Maxwell Reiss expertise in all things agave spirits front and centre

address: 971 SW 8th St, Miami, Florida, 33130
description: Julio Cabrera is a celebrated ambassador for Cuban culture in the cocktail world  both him and his signature fedora seem present wherever fine rum or cigars are to be found In 2019 the expat opened Caf La Trova a virtual embassy for his native islands culinary culture in Miamis aptlynamed Little Havana neighbourhood

address: Tabasco 149, Roma Nte., Cuauhtémoc, 06700 Ciudad de México, CDMX, Mexico
description: Bar Mauro might be a new addition to the beating heart of Mexico Citys hip La Roma neighbourhood but inside the concept is pure 1970s Italy Dur

address: 121 E 17th Street, Gramercy Park, New York, 10003
description: Takuma Watanabe earned a devout following helming the bar program at New York Citys legendary Angels Share After the beloved speakeasy closed Wantanabe opened Martinys an homage to the drinking cultures of his Tokyo birthplace as well as his Manhattan home

address: 550 Sutter St, San Francisco, CA 94108, United States
description: Pacific Cocktail Haven situated near San Franciscos Union Square is a destination for locals and visitors alike Its pineapple logo symbolizes an international tradition of hospitality dating back to the 1600s as the staff welcomes people of all backgrounds and their fourlegged friendsPacific Cocktail Haven situated near San Franciscos Union Square is a destination for locals and visitors alike Its pineapple logo symbolizes an international tradition of hospitality dating back to the 1600s as the staff welcomes people of all backgrounds and their fourlegged friends

address: 753 Alabama St, San Francisco, CA 94110, United States
description: Youll find True Laurel in the heart of San Franciscos Mission District a cozy but buzzy cocktail destination with two bars indoor tables and outdoor patio dining Chef David Barzelays dinner and brunch menus filled with stellar bar food complement bar directors Nicolas Torress creative cocktail menu in their conjoined sophomore effort after two Michelinstarred Lazy Bear

address: 510 Hudson St, New York, NY 10014, United States
description: Employees Only was a classic from the moment it opened the doors in 2004 Two decades later the art deco cocktail destination has lost none of the lustre  or popularity  that inspired a generation of imitators Walking past the tarot card reader in the foyer one emerges into a buzzing dinner club teleported from the 1920s

address: 115 Allen St, New York, 10002
description: In 2017 GN Chan and Faye Chen set out in a vintage yellow VW minibus to host a series of cocktail popups In the autumn of 2020 they parked the bus and moved into a permanent Lower East Side location

address: Iztaccihuatl 36D, Colonia Condesa, Cuauhtémoc, Mexico City, 06100
description: On any given Tuesday night you can find much of Mexico Citys craft cocktail community gathered at Baltra Bar for martinis The bartenders seal of approval is warranted Baltras space creates the feel of a neighbourhood caf coupled with a cosmopolitan drinks menu

address: 878 Bloor St W, Toronto, Ontario, M6G 1M5
description: This excellent bar eschews any trad speakeasy livery for a simple illuminated sign of a pineapple a universal symbol of hospitality If that wasnt enough the Bloor West facade numbered 878 carries the auspicious message whos to say whether its Talking Heads or Paolo Sorrentinoinspired This must be the place

address: Av. Andres Quintana Roo 2106, Zona Este, 22000 Tijuana, B.C., Mexico
description: Hidden away from the crowded tourist strips of Tijuana youll find Aruba Day Drink  a small bright room that feels very at home in this beachside town and promises the joys of music colour and parties

address: 926-928 U St NW, Washington DC, 20001
description: Since 2016 thirsty patrons have made Service Bar their goto local in The District for three great reasons the famous fried chicken the lively unpretentious ambience and outstanding cocktails delivered at reasonable prices The brainchild of seasoned DC industry vets Chad Spangler and Glendon Hartley the nofrills laidback neighbourhood bar offers a refreshing alternative to the more serious and pricey cocktail bars the city has to offer

address: 1263 W Temple St, Los Angeles, California, 90026
description: At the intersection of Historic Filipinotown Echo Park and Downtown Los Angeles lies Thunderboltwith its deliciously approachable cocktail list and Southerninspired food menu The open patio light pink highlights dark green walls orange stools and brown leather upholstery give it that bright and breezy SoCal feel

address: 3281 W Armitage Ave, Chicago, IL 60647, United States
description: Sometimes it is the most unassuming of neighbourhood bars that leave the biggest mark on the drinking culture of a city and thats certainly the case with Best Intentions a beloved neodive with a thoroughly Midwestern vibe

address: 1038 Canada Pl, Vancouver, BC V6C 0B9, Canada
description: Science meets nature at the Botanist Bar and cocktail lab at the Fairmont Pacific Rim hotel in downtown Vancouver In a sophisticated space that feels as bright and airy as the surrounding restaurant the tightknit bar team led by beverage director Grant Sceney draws inspiration from the natural bounty of the Pacific Northwest sourcing and foraging local ingredients to mix into drinks that are equal parts showpiece and storytelling

address: Km 7.6, Carr. Tulum-Boca Paila, Tulum Beach, 77760 Tulum, Q.R
description: Imagine an oasis carved out of the heart of the jungle on the Yucatan Peninsulas Quintana Roo This trove of liquid and culinary treasures is Tulums Arca Wooden tables sit in the shade of centuriesold trees and sweeping blooming flora

address: 135 Keefer St, Vancouver, BC V6A 1X3, Canada
description: Located within Vancouvers historic Chinatown The Keefer Bar has been an institution of the city for more than a decade Where expansion and modernisation has eroded away at some of Chinatowns history the bar uses its place to spotlight its history through a unique drinks programme that is inspired by old apothecaries

address: C. Macedonio Alcalá #403-int. 6, Ruta Independencia, Centro, Oaxaca, 68000
description: If one were to distil and bottle the essence of Oaxaca it would taste like a Selva cocktail The bars midcentury modern decor is offset by selva and agave plants outside and painted onto the stuccoed walls with elements of indigenous art complementing the design

address: Seven Mile Beach, 60 Tanager Way, KY1-1303, Cayman Islands
description: Located next to the beautiful Seven Mile Beach inside Kimpton Seafire Resort  Spa Library by the Sea consists of an indoor and outdoor cocktail experience all surrounded by mesmerising views of the Caribbean Jim Wrigley Beverage Manager and mastermind behind the bar has designed a cocktail menu inspired by a contemporary library where liquid stories are told every day

address: 2175 Rue de la Montagne #100, Montreal, QC H3G 1Z8
description: Founded in 2015 by head bartender Andrew Whibley Cloakroom is a unique 25seat cocktail bar located in the heart of the Golden Square Mile Entering Cloakroom is shrouded in the ideal amount of speakeasy cloakanddaggery as a host emerges from an innocuous woodpanelled area next to the tailor shop to welcome wellinformed cocktailians

address: 148 C. de San Sebastián, San Juan, Puerto Rico, 00901
description: La Factora poured fuel on Puerto Ricos contemporary cocktail scene when it opened in San Juan in 2013 and inside the charmingyetgritty bar it still feels very much a Boricua cultural icon and the countrys premier cocktail destination

address: 298 Bedford Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11249, United States
description: Maison Premiere offers an immersive trip into New Orleans gilded age with a distinctly New York twist The Brooklyn bar space evokes the Crescent City with ceiling fans a large marble bar and a replica of a historic Bourbon Street absinthe fountain

address: Av Sonora 189 -B, Hipódromo, Cuauhtémoc, 06100 Ciudad de México, CDMX, Mexico
description: Guests to Bijou Drinkery Room are advised that the password to the speakeasy is a simple smile Indeed this Mexico City jewel aims to bring joy to their chic g

address: Secret location, Colonia Juárez, Mexico City
description: On a dark street corner in hip Jurez neighbourhood lies a Oaxacan style traditional fonda While regulars tuck into tacos and tlayudas guests lucky enough to have a reservation are escorted into the back of the kitchen where a secret door opens to reveal Mexico Citys first true speakeasy

address: 512 Atwater Ave, Montreal, Quebec H4C 2G5, Canada
description: At the dead end of a graffitilined alleyway an industrial red light marks the entrance to Atwater Cocktail Club one of Montreals most charismatic cocktail bars Inside dark walls set a dramatic stage for glam details like shiny silver banquettes and glass ceilings both of which bounce warm rays of candlelight to every corner of the convivial space The mastermind behind it all Kate Boushel winner of the Altos Bartenders Bartender Award 2024

address: 1272 Dundas St W, Toronto, Ontario, M6J 1X7
description: Designed to feel like a vintage hotel lobby from a Wes Anderson movie Bar Mordecai can feel just about as twee as its muse with its resident hipster clientele and neonsigned basement karaoke rooms But its not just Instagrammers drawn to this trendy stretch of Dundas Street West youll also find serious drinkers thanks to Bar Mordecais communitybuilding that extends beyond the bar

address: 2812 W Palmer St, Chicago, IL 60647, United States
description: Convivial neighborhood bar vibes underscore the speakeasylike ambiance of Meadowlark one of the most compelling cocktail bars to open in Chicago in recent memory Housed in an historic building in the Logan Square neighbourhood and dressed with weathered exposed brick and a pastiche of antique accouterments it is an intimate cocktail den where generous Midwestern hospitality meets a humble celebration of the regions flavours history and culture

address: 938 W Fulton Market, Chicago, IL 60607, United States
description: From the Footman Hospitality group Spilt Milk Bangers  Lace and Emporium Arcade Bar together with veteran barman Peter Vestinos  who opened the

address: Hamburgo 70B, Juárez, Cuauhtémoc, 06600
description: Kaito del Valle began as an upstairs izakaya to accompany the stellar sushi restaurant of the same name But over time the bar grew into a destination of its own Drawing inspiration from Japans fabled kaito or female pearl divers the team is mixing up oneofakind Japanese inflected cocktails

address: 3701 N Williams St, Denver, CO 80205, USA
description: Launched in the Cole neighbourhood of Denver in 2021 by coowners McLain Hedges and Mary Alison Wright the Yacht Club is a dynamic neighbourhood bar with a per

address: 531 Hudson Street, New York, 10014
description: Dive bars serving craft cocktails are nothing new but Masahiro Urushidos Katana Kitten takes the concept to the next level Welcome to a Japanese dive bar serving some serious drinks Walking into the space one is surrounded by Japanese posters of 80s US blockbusters and the sounds of upbeat music Behind the long bar the hospitable staff broadly smile at each guest

address: 45 Grove St, New York, NY 10014, United States
description: In 1993 Tony Yoshida opened Angels Share and ushered in a new era for New York The bar introduced a generation to thenforgotten craft cocktails as well as to Japans rich drinks heritage In 2022 the upstairs lounge was forced out of its iconic downtown location two years later Tonys daughter Erina Yoshida reopened Angels Share in new West Village quarters

address: 874 Queen St W, Toronto, ON M6J 2V1, Canada
description: Fermentation is the heart and soul of Mother a smart bar on a chic stretch of retail and restaurants that back on to the park in Torontos perennially co

address: 1201 K St NW #1, Washington, DC 20005, United States
description: Allegory is hidden behind an unmarked door in DCs trendy Eaton Hotel But defying the standard speakeasy ethos the bar is a tribute to inclusivity not exclusivity The dimly lit space features leather banquettes a sleek wooden semicircular bar and a celebration of midcentury modern design but the art is the most striking feature

address: 79-81 MacDougal St, New York, NY 10012, USA
Chihuahua 135, Roma Nte., Cuauhtémoc, Mexico City, 06700
description: When you mix a group of celebrated veterans from restaurant Pujol with vinyl aficionados and add a bar spoon of history youre likely to capture lightning in a bottle This combo has propelled Caf de Nadie into one of Mexico Citys mustvisit attractions

address: 900 F St NW, Washington, DC 20004, United States
description: Silver Lyan offers a literal vault of cocktail gold in Washington DCs iconic Penn Quarter Located in a converted bank space blocks from the Smithsonian complex the subterranean lounge serves up postmodern delights in a midcentury environment

address: Calz. De La Presa No. 85, Zona Centro, 37700 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico
description: Set on the terrace of a colonial building with one of the best views of San Miguel de Allendes downtown district Bekeb is at the forefront of this citys wave of innovative new cocktail bars Named after the Tzotzil cultures word bek meaning seed owner and director Fabiola Padilla former head bartender of Enrique Olveras Cosme at New York designs drinks that utilise Mexican fruits plants flowers seeds roots and traditional elixirs

address: 4905 Freret St, New Orleans, LA 70115, United States
description: Cure sparked the restoration of uptown New Orleans Freret Street corridor in the wake of the flooding following Hurricane Katrina En route to winning numerous honours Cure also helped restore craft cocktails to the Crescent City and much of the US South
